content:
@everyone 
I'm beginning the process of revamping the coordination repo with the new source files!
I'll be making some changes as well, to make it easier on everyone and to be prepared for a potential 2nd wave of volunteers.
- All files will now be .xslx (again) to help avoid the myriad issues that come with the localized differences in .csv standards, and to make file sizes smaller;
- I'll be templating Past Contributions in the Ledgers in a very specific way, to allow for an automatic compiling process for accreditations;
- **Volunteers will no longer be asked to reupload their edited files into the repo;** rather, I'll set up a <#1446619934565204231> channel for volunteers to send in **their contributions on files that were pulled from __the coordination repo__**;
- I'll also be setting up an automation process that allows for compiling of miscellaneous files, should volunteers want to contribute keys from the source files that haven't been organized into directories yet.
My ultimate goal is to make contributing as simple as possible with the least confusion possible, while still ensuring no ones' toes get stepped on, and that the end results are as useable for Ace as possible.

The new steps of workflow for volunteers (should they use my repo) will be:

## - Go to [My Repository](https://github.com/omnichromia/morimens-volunteer-coordination).
If you do not have access (error 404), tell me your GitHub username and I'll add you as a collaborator.
## - Find the file you want to contribute on.
## - Open, Edit, and Sign that file's Ledger.
Just change (OPEN) next to your language to any identifying name, whether it be your discord handle, discord name, nickname, github name, etc.
## - Download the .xlsx file and make your contributions.
It doesn't matter if you hide or delete columns or rows, or rename the file, or anything like that. All I need are the Key column and your contribution.
## - Upload the file to <#1446619934565204231>, and say anything relevant about it you wish to say.
- the only information I __NEED__ is:
  - Whether your contribution was **Translation** or **Proofreading**; it's Translation if you referenced another language (CN, EN, or Gameplay Functions), it's Proofreading if you only referenced your own language.
  - The name(s) of __ANY OTHER VOLUNTEER__ that contributed any effort to that contribution.

From there, I will take your file, incorporate it into the repo's file, and move your name from the header into Past Contributions. Contributions will be diffed against the source files and sent upstream all at once when Ace requests them. <:mu_ok2:1333996271421231127>
With that said, I've finished updating the Text Messages directory with the new source files and contributions!
